evidence.fact: The dashboard displays the number of active exams, total enrolled students, and how many competencies are covered.
evidence.fact_span: displays the number of active exams

evidence.claim: The system allows registration and login to a personal dashboard
evidence.fact: Instructors can create accounts and log in to the system to access their personal dashboard.
evidence.user_story_span: register and log in to a personal dashboard
evidence.fact_span: create accounts and log in to the system to access their personal dashboard

evidence.fact: The dashboard displays the number of active exams, total enrolled students, and how many competencies are covered.

evidence.claim: Active exams refer to exams that are currently ongoing or scheduled
evidence.fact: Instructors can schedule exams with a close date.
evidence.user_story_span: Active exams refer to exams that are currently ongoing or scheduled

evidence.fact: The personal dashboard shows competency coverage.

evidence.claim: An instructor on their dashboard sees active exams
evidence.fact: A teacher registers, signs in, and views a control panel showing live tests, enrollment figures, and skill coverage.

evidence.claim: Competency coverage indicates which skills or topics are being assessed
evidence.fact: Instructors tag questions with one or more skill areas and set their difficulty to control the reward rate.
evidence.user_story_span: Competency coverage indicates which skills or topics are being assessed
evidence.fact_span: tag questions with one or more skill areas
